_help: Fixtures for validate_non_get_endpoints.py. CREATE entries provide the request body for each create step; the harness captures returned IDs into a shared context and threads them through UPDATE/DELETE steps. UPDATE/DELETE entries here are reference shapes only — at runtime the harness merges them with IDs from context. Set `skip: true` to keep an entry as documentation without executing it. The harness uses snake_case for top-level kwargs; nested dicts use the SDK's TypedDict aliases (camelCase) which pydantic resolves at construction.

create-media.description: Create an on-demand media from a public URL.

direct-upload-video-media.description: Mint a signed URL for a direct browser upload. Non-destructive.

request.name: Non-GET Validator Playlist
request.description: Created by validate non get endpoints

create-new-stream.description: Create a new live stream. Costs nothing until it goes live.

create_signing_key.description: Create a new signing key for JWT minting.

Add-media-track.description: Attach a subtitle track to the media created earlier.

Generate-subtitle-track.description: Trigger subtitle generation on an audio track.

create-media-playback-id.description: Create an additional playback ID on the media.

create-playbackId-of-stream.description: Create an additional playback ID on the live stream.

create-simulcast-of-stream.description: Create a simulcast destination on the live stream.

updated-media.description: Update metadata on the created media.

update-media-track.description: Replace the URL/language on the created track.

cancel-upload.description: Cancel the in-progress resumable upload from direct-upload-video-media.

add-media-to-playlist.description: Add the created media to the created playlist.

change-media-order-in-playlist.description: Re-order media in the playlist (uses captured mediaIds).

update-domain-restrictions.description: Set domain restrictions on the created playback ID.

update-user-agent-restrictions.description: Set user-agent restrictions on the created playback ID.

update-live-stream.description: Update metadata on the created live stream.

complete-live-stream.description: End the live stream early. Expected to fail with HTTP 400 in a credentials-only run (no active RTMPS encoder).
complete-live-stream.expectedFailReason: No active RTMPS encoder is broadcasting to the stream, so the API rejects 'finish' with 400.

update-specific-simulcast-of-stream.description: Toggle isEnabled on the created simulcast.

delete-media-playback-id.description: Delete the created media playback ID.

delete-media-from-playlist.description: Remove the created media from the playlist.

delete-playbackId-of-stream.description: Delete the created stream playback ID.
